zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Piast of Brieg於1341年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 史萊先時，她的父親Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg21歲，母親Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan20歲。她於1358年7月28日與Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing在海因里希_結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年3月14日在荷蘭-拉藍德丹 哈格享年45歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德丹 哈格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Piast of Brieg于1341年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 史萊先时，她的父亲Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg21岁，母亲Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan20岁。她于1358年7月28日与Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing在海因里希_结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年3月14日在荷兰-拉藍德丹 哈格享年45岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德丹 哈格。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: occupational name from Middle Low German pravest ‘provost’. See also Provost .
German: nickname for an ostentatious person, from Middle High German brast ‘pageantry, show, display’.
Austrian German: dialect form of   Propst  .

variants.name: Provost
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Pierre, Andre, Emile, Camille, Lucien, Normand, Alphonse, Cecile, Gilles, Jacques.
French: northern and western variant of Prévost (see Prevost ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (compare 2 below).

English: occupational name from Middle English provost, provest, proust ‘provost, steward, representative’ (Old English prafost), also used for the head of a religious chapter or educational establishment, or, since such officials were usually clergy and celibate, a nickname for a self-important person.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Brieg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: possibly a nickname from an old agent derivative of Swabian bräugen ‘to cry, to roar’.

variants.name: Braig
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named in Württemberg. Compare   Breig  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Piast of Brieg was born in 1341, in Silesia, Prussia, Germany, her father, Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg, was 21 and her mother, Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan, was 20. She married Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing on 28 July 1358, in Prussia. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 March 1386, in The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 45, and was buried in The Hague, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Piast of Brieg est née en 1341, à Province de Silésie, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing le 28 juillet 1358, à Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mars 1386, à La Haye, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à La Haye, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Piast of Brieg 1341 in Provinz Schlesien, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg 21 und ihre Mutter Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan 20. Sie hat am 28. Juli 1358 in Preußen Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. März 1386 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Den Haag, Südholland, Niederlande und wurde in Den Haag, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Piast of Brieg è nata il nel 1341 nel Provinz Schlesien, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing il 28 luglio 1358, nel Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 marzo 1386, nel Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Piast of Briegが1341年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ スチレシンで生まれた時，父Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzegは21歳，母Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zaganは20歳であった。1358年7月28日にプレウssンでAlbrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年3月14日にオランダズイド-hオランドデン ハアグで45歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドデン ハアグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Piast of Brieg(이)가 1341년 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 슐레시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1358년 7월 28일 플레우ss에서 Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 3월 14일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 든 하아그에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 든 하아그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Piast of Brieg nasceu em 1341, em Provinz Schlesien, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing em 28 de julho de 1358, em Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de março de 1386, em Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Piast of Brieg родилась в 1341 г. в местности провинз щлесиен, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing 28 июля 1358 г. в местности Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 марта 1386 г. в местности ден хааг, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности ден хааг, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Piast of Brieg nació en 1341, en Provinz Schlesien, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Albrecht I von Bayern (born Wittelsbach), Herzog zu Bayern und Bayern-Straubing el 28 de julio de 1358, en Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1386, en Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Den Haag, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
